prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
Forecast remaining useful life for transformer T-016 and state whether it can safely operate for the next 180 days without major maintenance.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should report an RUL estimate in days, compare it against the 180-day horizon, and provide a clear maintenance recommendation.

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [fmsr] get_dga_record — Retrieve the most recent dissolved gas analysis (DGA) record for transformer T-016.
  Step 2: [fmsr] analyze_dga — Classify a set of dissolved gas concentrations into a fault type using the IEC 60599 Rogers Ratio method. (depends on steps [1])
  Step 3: [tsfm] get_rul — Retrieve the most recent remaining useful life (RUL) estimate for transformer T-016. (depends on steps [2])
  Step 4: [tsfm] forecast_rul — Project the RUL forward by 180 days using a linear degradation model. (depends on steps [3])

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "step": 1,
    "task": "Retrieve the most recent dissolved gas analysis (DGA) record for transformer T-016.",
    "server": "fmsr",
    "tool": "get_dga_record",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-016"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-016\",\n  \"sample_date\": \"2024-01-23T00:00:00\",\n  \"dissolved_h2_ppm\": 73.15,\n  \"dissolved_ch4_ppm\": 74.0,\n  \"dissolved_c2h2_ppm\": 24.4,\n  \"dissolved_c2h4_ppm\": 102.79,\n  \"dissolved_c2h6_ppm\": 46.79,\n  \"dissolved_co_ppm\": 674.11,\n  \"dissolved_co2_ppm\": 3133.28,\n  \"fault_label\": \"Arc discharge\",\n  \"source_dataset\": \"synthetic\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "continue",
    "verifier_reason": "Current step was successful and no indication that the remaining plan should change.",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "",
    "retries_used": 0
  },
  {
    "step": 2,
    "task": "Classify a set of dissolved gas concentrations into a fault type using the IEC 60599 Rogers Ratio method.",
    "server": "fmsr",
    "tool": "analyze_dga",
    "tool_args": {
      "h2": 73.15,
      "ch4": 74.0,
      "c2h2": 24.4,
      "c2h4": 102.79,
      "c2h6": 46.79,
      "transformer_id": "T-016"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"iec_code\": \"N\",\n  \"diagnosis\": \"Normal / Inconclusive\",\n  \"r1_ch4_h2\": 1.0116,\n  \"r2_c2h2_c2h4\": 0.2374,\n  \"r3_c2h4_c2h6\": 2.1968,\n  \"input_gases\": {\n    \"h2_ppm\": 73.15,\n    \"ch4_ppm\": 74.0,\n    \"c2h2_ppm\": 24.4,\n    \"c2h4_ppm\": 102.79,\n    \"c2h6_ppm\": 46.79\n  },\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-016\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "continue",
    "verifier_reason": "Normal / Inconclusive diagnosis, no indication to change the remaining plan",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "",
    "retries_used": 0
  },
  {
    "step": 3,
    "task": "Retrieve the most recent remaining useful life (RUL) estimate for transformer T-016.",
    "server": "tsfm",
    "tool": "get_rul",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-016",
      "sample_date": "2024-01-23T00:00:00",
      "forecast_days": 180
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-016\",\n  \"as_of_date\": \"2024-01-31\",\n  \"rul_days\": 57,\n  \"health_index\": 0.0522,\n  \"fdd_category\": 4,\n  \"confidence\": 0.808,\n  \"interpretation\": \"Degraded \\u2014 maintenance recommended within 30 days.\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "continue",
    "verifier_reason": "Current RUL estimate is 57 days, which is less than the 180-day forecast period, but the remaining steps do not suggest a change in plan.",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "",
    "retries_used": 0
  },
  {
    "step": 4,
    "task": "Project the RUL forward by 180 days using a linear degradation model.",
    "server": "tsfm",
    "tool": "forecast_rul",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-016",
      "horizon_days": 180
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-016\",\n  \"current_rul_days\": 57,\n  \"forecast_date\": \"2024-07-29\",\n  \"projected_rul_days\": 0,\n  \"projected_health_index\": 0.0,\n  \"confidence\": 0.608,\n  \"method\": \"linear_degradation_baseline\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "continue",
    "verifier_reason": "Forecasted remaining useful life is 0 days, which suggests the transformer cannot safely operate for the next 180 days without major maintenance.",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "reassess maintenance plan",
    "retries_used": 0
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
Based on the results, the remaining useful life (RUL) of transformer T-016 is projected to be 0 days after 180 days, indicating that it is unlikely to safely operate for the next 180 days without major maintenance. The linear degradation model used for the projection has a confidence level of 0.608, suggesting some uncertainty in the forecast.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": true,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true,
    "generalized_result_verification": true,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true,
    "clarity_and_justification": true,
    "hallucinations": false,
    "suggestions": ""
}
